expectations.text: Letter includes tenant name (Sarah Chen) and property address (123 Oak Street)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Dear Sarah' and '123 Oak Street' throughout

expectations.text: Current rent ($1,800) and new rent ($1,900) are both stated
Tone is professional but not cold - follows the real estate template pattern
expectations.evidence: Warm tone: 'valued tenant', 'hope you've been enjoying', 'happy to arrange a time to talk', 'great tenant'. Follows skill's guideline of professional-but-approachable.
